fullArticle:
HIDDEN NY has reunited with ASICS to launch the collaborative GEL-KINETIC™ 2.0 sneaker capsule

Shifting from the modern creator tools that inspired their previous GEL-NYC, the new shoe honors early digital art software and vintage hardware

Engineered exclusively as a dedicated lifestyle walking shoe, the model incorporates advanced Scutoid GEL™ and FF BLAST™ PLUS tech

Global curation platform and publishing imprint HIDDEN.NY has officially joined forces with ASICS SportStyle yet again to debut the HIDDEN GEL-KINETIC™ 2.0. Acting as the spiritual successor to their highly coveted GEL-NYC partnership, this latest joint venture takes a nostalgic step backward—moving away from the modern software suites utilized by today’s digital designers to draw visual inspiration from the dawn of digita...
